records.m_Talk_ENG: Dean! We've come to get you out! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dean! We've come to get you out! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dean! We've come to get you out! Are you all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir! Wake up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir! Wake up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir! Wake up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, help the dean get up! He's too weak!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, help the dean get up! He's too weak!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, help the dean get up! He's too weak!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shh...! Don't be so dramatic. I'm all right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shh...! Don't be so dramatic. I'm all right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shh...! Don't be so dramatic. I'm all right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you. Have you ever heard of something called a prophecy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you. Have you ever heard of something called a prophecy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you. Have you ever heard of something called a prophecy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A prophecy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A prophecy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A prophecy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You see, all my life, I've never once believed in the existence of god.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You see, all my life, I've never once believed in the existence of god.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You see, all my life, I've never once believed in the existence of god.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even my journey into the field of archeology was to change my suspicion into certainty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even my journey into the field of archeology was to change my suspicion into certainty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even my journey into the field of archeology was to change my suspicion into certainty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be certain that god is... nothing but a fabrication that weak humans have invented to overcome their fear of the unknown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be certain that god is... nothing but a fabrication that weak humans have invented to overcome their fear of the unknown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be certain that god is... nothing but a fabrication that weak humans have invented to overcome their fear of the unknown.

records.m_Talk_DEU: S-sir! This isn't the time to debate about atheism!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-sir! This isn't the time to debate about atheism!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those Institution bastards will be here any second now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those Institution bastards will be here any second now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those Institution bastards will be here any second now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I joined the Society to pursue the Lake of Knowledge, but my suspicions were never resolved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I joined the Society to pursue the Lake of Knowledge, but my suspicions were never resolved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I joined the Society to pursue the Lake of Knowledge, but my suspicions were never resolved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more I coveted knowledge, the more I got confused.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more I coveted knowledge, the more I got confused.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more I coveted knowledge, the more I got confused.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what have I been doing with my life?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what have I been doing with my life?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what have I been doing with my life?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But then, I heard it today. The prophecy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But then, I heard it today. The prophecy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But then, I heard it today. The prophecy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, perhaps it was just an auditory hallucination. But I heard it whisper into my ear so clearly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, perhaps it was just an auditory hallucination. But I heard it whisper into my ear so clearly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, perhaps it was just an auditory hallucination. But I heard it whisper into my ear so clearly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But WHY?! How did you come to my rescue?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But WHY?! How did you come to my rescue?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But WHY?! How did you come to my rescue?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Archeology Department has been abandoned by the Society, so you couldn't have done it by yourselves!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Archeology Department has been abandoned by the Society, so you couldn't have done it by yourselves!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Archeology Department has been abandoned by the Society, so you couldn't have done it by yourselves!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's because the fanatics who call themselves the <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color> suddenly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's because the fanatics who call themselves the <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color> suddenly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's because the fanatics who call themselves the <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color> suddenly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you curious to know... why we are getting you out from here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you curious to know... why we are getting you out from here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you curious to know... why we are getting you out from here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I shall answer your question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I shall answer your question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I shall answer your question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is because... Mother requires you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is because... Mother requires you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is because... Mother requires you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Professor James, Dean of the Archeology Department.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Professor James, Dean of the Archeology Department.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir! The boat! It arrived!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I think we are too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I think we are too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I think we are too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to break out of prison while I was away on my business trip...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to break out of prison while I was away on my business trip...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to break out of prison while I was away on my business trip...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Lady Elizabeth hadn't contacted me sooner, we would have missed you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Lady Elizabeth hadn't contacted me sooner, we would have missed you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Lady Elizabeth hadn't contacted me sooner, we would have missed you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Descendants of Sir Burnett...? You guys are too persistent.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Descendants of Sir Burnett...? You guys are too persistent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, it is your will to live that is persistent, James. How was prison life for you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, it is your will to live that is persistent, James. How was prison life for you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, it is your will to live that is persistent, James. How was prison life for you?
